overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a tattered, blood-stained school uniform exploring a dimly lit traditional Japanese house. The character moves from a sewing workroom through atmospheric misty corridors into a study adorned with vintage posters, creating a tense horror ambiance with warm lantern lighting and wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese workroom with sewing station

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit workroom toward a sliding fusuma door

entered.detail: wooden desk with vintage sewing machine and stool
built-in shelves stacked with folded fabrics and linens
garments hanging on wall hooks including orange fabric
opaque sliding door with wooden frame leading to corridor

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a traditional Japanese workroom illuminated by a single hanging bulb. The space features tatami flooring, a sewing machine on a wooden desk, and shelves filled with folded fabrics. The character walks steadily toward a sliding fusuma door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty wooden corridor with atmospheric fog

events.description: character slides open fusuma door and steps into fog-filled wooden hallway

agents.ego_description: opening the sliding door and entering the narrow corridor filled with mist

entered.detail: narrow corridor with wooden plank flooring and support beams
translucent paper sliding doors with wooden lattice frames
thick mist hovering near the floor throughout the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow wooden corridor filled with atmospheric fog. The space is dimly lit by hanging light bulbs, with shoji screens lining the walls. The wooden floorboards creak as the character moves deeper into the misty hallway, leaving the workroom behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corridor with wall clock and shelves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor passing wooden storage shelves

entered.detail: round analog clock mounted on the wooden wall
low shelves holding books and storage boxes
vertical wall decoration in a lit doorway

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the misty corridor, the character passes a wall clock and wooden storage shelves. The hallway remains narrow and dim, with fog partially obscuring the hanging light bulbs ahead. The character approaches a warmly lit doorway at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: study room with vintage propaganda posters

events.description: character enters a well-lit room with colorful posters on the wall

agents.ego_description: entering the room and examining the vintage posters and study furnishings

entered.detail: vintage Japanese athletic posters including Olympic imagery and Mount Fuji
study desk with books and lamp near the window
heavy curtains covering the window blocking outside light
shelf displaying trophies and books against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a study room illuminated by warm lamplight, with vintage Japanese posters covering the left wall. The room features tatami flooring, a wooden desk with trophies, and curtained windows. The character moves through the space, observing the detailed decorations and furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark, utilitarian workroom through a hauntingly misty corridor and into a warmly lit private study. It begins in a traditional Japanese room illuminated by a single bulb, moving past a sewing machine and fabric-filled shelves toward a sliding fusuma door. As the character steps through the doorway, the environment shifts into a narrow wooden hallway where atmospheric fog partially obscures hanging lights and shoji screens. The camera continues deeper into the dim, misty passage, passing a wall clock and storage shelves before approaching a glow at the end of the hall. The scene finally opens into a study adorned with vintage posters and trophies, where the lighting transforms from a cold, foggy haze into a warm, inviting lamplight.
